name: Astron Connect Inc.
summary: Astron Connect Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution and sale of beverage and food products in Canada, China, and internationally. The company also offers bottled water, skin care, supplements, and agricultural products. Its channels of distribution cover chain stores, wholesalers, and importers. The company was formerly known as Exalt Capital Corp. and changed its name to Astron Connect Inc. in August 2018. Astron Connect Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
